title: Freeze exact-engine boundary
description: Document that T548 owns the extraction of a real exact-inference module, compile artifact, and query seam for the current repo state while leaving soft-evidence mutation, cache invalidation, incremental compile hooks, and approximate fallback to their adjacent tasks.

title: Extract inference package and interfaces
description: Create a dedicated inference package with engine config, compile/query result types, and engine-specific exceptions so the backend stops treating exact inference as ad hoc helpers inside server.py.

title: Implement current-model compile artifact
description: Compile the current market state into an immutable exact-engine artifact with source-state hashing inputs, truthful clique summaries, bounded-treewidth metadata, and eligibility fields for the repo's current independent-market model.

title: Add exact query backend
description: Implement exact query hooks on top of the compiled artifact for marginal lookup and atomic EventTrade pricing, while preserving the existing event_trade_inference_unavailable boundary for broader CNF shapes.

title: Wire server through the engine adapter
description: Route engine-stats, probability-edit preview/base-slice reads, and EventTrade pricing through the new inference boundary without changing the frozen HTTP contracts or stealing ownership from later soft-evidence tasks.

title: Add skeleton parity coverage
description: Add unit and integration coverage for compile artifacts, engine-stats parity, and exact-query correctness against the existing brute-force tiny-net fixtures so T548 lands with a stable compatibility baseline.
